## Summary

Describe the requested capability.

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the expected behavior or UI.

## Data / source impact

State whether the feature needs new sources, new attribution, or new licensing review.

## Additional context

Add mockups, links, or reference material if available.
